nasb.text: David said to Achish, “Very well, you shall know what your servant can do.” So Achish said to David, “Very well, I will make you my bodyguard for life.”

esv.text: David said to Achish, “Very well, you shall know what your servant can do.” And Achish said to David, “Very well, I will make you my bodyguard for life.”

cnv.text: 大衛回答亞吉說：“僕人所能作的事你都知道。”於是亞吉對大衛說：“好吧，我要立你永遠作我的護衛長。”

ccb.text: 大卫答道：“仆人愿意效劳。”亚吉说：“很好！你就终生做我的护卫吧。”
